specs.title: cp-000: List view does NOT render a favicon image
cp-001: List view does NOT render authors
cp-002: List view does NOT render abstractsnippet text
cp-003: Magazine card glass-panel rounded-2xl overflow-hidden
cp-004: Magazine hover state unselected hoverring-1 hoverring-border
cp-005: Image container w-full h-48 bg-surface-raised overflow-hidden bg visible when im
cp-006: Image uses object-cover fit
cp-007: Content area padding p-5
cp-008: Magazine title text-base larger than card views text-sm
cp-009: Magazine read title font-medium text-ink-muted card view uses font-normal
cp-010: Magazine abstract shows full articleabstractSnippet NOT truncated to 120 chars l
cp-011: Magazine abstract styling text-sm text-ink-muted line-clamp-3 leading-relaxed
cp-012: Magazine external link text Open NOT DOI like card view
cp-013: Magazine external link uses articlelink NOT httpsdoiorgarticledoi
cp-014: Magazine external link only shows when articlelink is truthy NOT articledoi
cp-015: Search input pl-9 pr-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs
cp-016: Search clear button position right-3 top-12 -translate-y-12
cp-017: Filter toggle with active filters bg-brand10 text-brand border-brand20
cp-018: Filter toggle without active filters bg-surface-raised text-ink-muted border-bor
cp-019: Blue dot indicator w-15 h-15 rounded-full bg-brand
cp-020: Sort toggle icon SortAscending when sortBy oldest SortDescending otherwise
cp-021: Advanced filter panel glass-panel rounded-xl p-3 space-y-3 only rendered when sh
cp-022: Date filter From label text-10px text-ink-muted font-medium uppercase tracking-w
cp-023: Date filter To label same styling as From
cp-024: Date inputs are typedate native HTML date picker
cp-025: Journal dropdown label Journal uppercase tracking-wide
cp-026: Journal dropdown default option text All journals
cp-027: Advanced sort labels Date for published Added Title 3 equal-width buttons
cp-028: Advanced sort active bg-brand10 text-brand border border-brand20
cp-029: Advanced sort inactive bg-surface-raised text-ink-muted border border-border hov
cp-030: currentLegacySort derivation sortBy relevance title published maps store sort to
cp-031: Setting sort added with sortDir asc normalizes to store sortBy oldest
cp-032: Setting sort published with sortDir desc normalizes to store sortBy newest
cp-033: hasActiveFilters does NOT include searchQuery only checks filterDateFrom filterD
cp-034: Reader panel glass-panel rounded-2xl h-full overflow-y-auto p-5
